name: Advanced OBX Group
description:
2 outdoor private courts
Contact Will Brown for more info:  434-907-5427 or dei.gratia123@gmail.com
Looking to form groups of advanced players: 4.0+ level play and drills

If we can form an advanced group, would like to use indoor courts during cold or rainy weather with this group at DCRC gym.  Non-residents welcome!

2 blocks from public beach access.

name: Colington Harbour H.O.A.
description: Colington Harbour H.O.A. is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kill Devil Hills, NC. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are private.

name: DCRC Gym
description: First-time participants to the indoor program must sign a waiver.

name: DCRC Outdoor Courts
description:
DCRC has 4 outdoor courts reserve Mon - Sat 730 am - 11am  
DCRC Gym has 6 indoor courts
open_play_schedule: Schedule changes monthly here is a link https://dcpr.recdesk.com/Community/Calendar?facilityId=78

name: Dowdy Park
description: Dowdy Park is a place to play pickleball in Nags Head, NC. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The court is free.

name: Duck Woods Country Club
description: Duck Woods Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Southern Shores, NC. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Club Membership Application/Approval, Initiation Fee, Monthly Dues.

name: Fessenden Center
description: Come play pickleball at Fessenden Center in Buxton, NC! There are 4 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Lions Club Center at Westcott Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lions Club Center at Westcott Park in Manteo, NC! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Outer Banks Family YMCA
description: Outer Banks Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Nags Head, NC. The court surface is wood. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Pigum Walker Park
description: Pigum Walker Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wanchese, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Sea Scape Beach & Golf Villas
description: Sea Scape Beach & Golf Villas is a place to play pickleball in Kitty Hawk Beach, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Ships Watch Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Ships Watch Resort in Duck, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.
